V-001.reason: counter_evidence:moderate — AR-VLA (autoregressive action expert) emerges as alternative to diffusion policy; however ScanDP/PPGuide/Pixel Motion Diffusion still show diffusion dominance. LIBERO 饱和使评测区分度下降。

V-005.reason: counter_evidence:moderate — 'Breaking Barriers: Do Reinforcement Post Training Gains Transfer To Unseen Domains?' 直接质疑 RL 后训练的 OOD 泛化能力，与假设核心主张相悖。

V-008.reason: benchmark_relevance:weak — LeRobot v0.5.0 / Octo v1.5 发布支持开源进展，但 LIBERO 榜单饱和 (98-99%) 导致开源 vs 闭源对比基准失效。

V-010.reason: benchmark_relevance:weak — DepthCache/ScanDP/PLANING 均支持 3D 必要性假设，但 LIBERO 饱和使精度评测基准区分度不足。

note: 4 个假设有 early warning (机械预评分确认)：V-001/V-005 为 counter_evidence:moderate (0.50)，V-008/V-010 为 benchmark_relevance:weak (0.25)。无强触发 (score=1.00)。
